next_steps: Place patient in airborne and contact isolation
Perform RPR and treponemal-specific serology for syphilis
Order HIV screening (4th generation Ag/Ab test)
Obtain skin scraping for scabies mite identification
Send PCR for VZV and HSV from vesicular and oral ulcer fluid
Obtain measles IgM serology and PCR from throat swab/urine
Perform blood culture and repeat CBC with manual differential to assess for eosinophilia
Avoid systemic corticosteroids or immunosuppressants pending results
